title: Nursing | NHSScotland Careers
content: Home Explore careers Nursing Nursing The key role of a nurse is to deliver person-centred, safe and effective care. Nurses help patients understand information about their diagnoses and treatment. They also respond to each patient’s physical, clinical, and emotional needs. Areas of nursing practice In the UK, there are 4 areas of practice. These are: adult nursing children’s nursing learning disabilities nursing mental health nursing Whichever route you take into nursing, you’ll study a degree programme in your chosen practice area. Adult nurse Children's nurse Learning disability nurse Mental health nurse Operating department practitioner Prison nurse Explore careers Discover the skills and qualifications you’ll need for each role and what the work will be like.
